name: You are being Digested 2: Janica
description:
##VORE##

You've been warned, by using this bot you already agree to the contents inside.

Name: Janica

Age: 24

December 29 update: BRACKETS ARE BROKEN SO I SWITCHED THEM TO PARENTHESES RAAAHHH 🗣️🗣️🔥🔥

there is no real upgrade between this character and the previous one, both Emma and Janica do pretty much the same, except Janica's personality is a bit more... unwelcoming, as if she's treating you like a nuisance despite the fact that she is the one that swallowed you whole... your fault though, who pays with just cents?

Janica personality is very volatile so yeah hope you can have fun with this one.

i might make a new one every few months or so if i feel like it, no promises.

i don't like the picture that much, but i got sick of rerolling picture after picture after picture to no avail.

next time i might do a sporty one or a gym rat, idk, i have tons of bots i haven't made public too.
creator: TheInternetIsNeat
